objective: Execute the approved P0.1-P7.3 Orin NX engineering loop as one long-running contract: close current state drift, finish the startup black-border follow-up, add stability/P99 evidence where hardware allows, strengthen backend and CUDA-MMAPI route decisions, preserve producer boundary evidence, synchronize presentation materials, and prepare a clean checkpoint.

entry_context.project_positioning: Jetson Orin NX heterogeneous video compute and device-side dataflow optimization, with EIS as the representative real-time workload.
entry_context.accepted_device_path: MMAPI/NVDEC block-linear NV12 main chain -> NvBufSurfTransform to pitch-linear NV12_ER scratch -> VPI CUDA PerspectiveWarp -> NvBufSurfTransform back to block-linear NV12 -> NVENC
entry_context.latest_negative_boundary: The CUDA-owned VPI bridge is closed as negative evidence for non-identity MMAPI/NVENC output. Identity passes and standalone CUDA-owned RGBA VPI warp is exact, but the full return path to NV12/NVENC is not visually correct.
entry_context.current_reason_to_continue: The first evidence package is strong, but the project still benefits from higher-density autumn-recruitment evidence: state cleanup, startup-black-fix closeout, stability/P99 evidence, backend decision tables, CUDA-MMAPI route recovery, producer boundary explanation, and final interview artifacts.

frozen_variables: Do not change the accepted Regular quality anchor resid_r15_s07 unless a new explicit quality contract is created.
Use source_to_dest matrices for Regular05 and Regular gate device replay.
Keep Regular as the main quality gate and Running/Parallax/QuickRotation/Crowd as challenge or diagnostic boundaries.
Do not reopen global affine/rigid parameter sweeps as part of this loop.
Do not revive the failed CUDA-owned VPI bridge as an accepted optimization path.
Do not claim zero-copy, full real-time EIS, full-pipeline acceleration, VPI optical-flow acceleration, or all-scene/product-grade EIS.
Keep oral-template TXT and local secrets out of Git.
external_observation: existing and newly collected summary CSV/log fields
Jetson command exit codes when hardware access is available
manual visual review status when a subjective quality decision is required

P1.decision_boundary: Do not mark accepted until the user confirms that the full-clip constant extra scale has acceptable FOV/scale trade-off.

P2.decision_boundary: Existing repeat evidence supports a small mean lifecycle gain and clean rc/fallback behavior. It does not prove a tail-latency win and does not claim a 30-minute endurance run.

P3.decision: Use VPI high-resolution PerspectiveWarp, accepted C++ MMAPI/VPI/NVENC, stream-only reuse, NvBuffer pair, VPI C++ Remap, and standalone CUDA dynamic warp as scoped evidence. Keep VPI Python backend swap, PyrLK replacement, Python appsink/appsrc, current EGL-scratch CUDA affine, CUDA double-surface translate, VPI CUDA-owned bridge non-identity, and static local Remap correction as negative evidence.
P3.boundary: Backend capability is not the same as project value. Every route remains scoped as baseline, module, device-stage, diagnostic, or negative evidence.

P4.decision: Do not continue the failed VPI CUDA-owned bridge. The only CUDA route worth considering is a new official-sample-shaped CUDA-to-encoder verifier, identity first, then integer translate, then affine/matrix only after correctness passes.
P4.next_verifier: Start from Jetson Multimedia API CUDA processing with encode shape, verify encoder-compatible identity/marker writeback, then translate, then affine/matrix replay.
P4.requires_internal_ai_if: Local Jetson official samples do not settle NvBufSurface/EGLImage/CUDA/NVENC ownership and sync order.
P4.internal_ai_prompt: 我在做 Jetson Orin NX 异构视频计算与设备侧数据流优化项目，EIS 是代表性实时视觉负载。当前 accepted path 是 MMAPI/NVDEC block-linear NV12 main chain -> NvBufSurfTransform 到 pitch-linear NV12_ER scratch -> VPI CUDA PerspectiveWarp -> transform 回 block-linear -> NVENC。现在的 blocker 是：identity/full-frame copy 可以通过，standalone CUDA-owned RGBA VPI warp 也正确，但在当前 EGL-mapped pitch-linear NV12_ER scratch 或 CUDA-owned bridge 上做 non-identity random sampling 后，返回 NV12/NVENC 会出现 tearing、颜色或内容错误。请搜索公司内部开放且合规可参考的 Jetson / NVIDIA VPI / CUDA / MMAPI / NvBufSurface / EGLImage / NVENC 资料或 sample，重点回答：1. 在 Jetson MMAPI/NVENC 链路中，CUDA kernel 或 VPI CUDA 对中间 surface 做 non-identity warp 后，正确返回 NVENC 的推荐 memory ownership / sync / copy-back 路线是什么？2. 是否应该使用 CUDA-owned intermediate surface，再通过 NvBufSurface/NvBuffer/NvBufSurfTransform 或 documented copy 回 encoder-compatible block-linear NV12？3. EGLImage / cudaGraphicsEGLRegisterImage / NvBufSurfaceMapEglImage / cache sync / layout / pitch / color format 有哪些已知坑？4. 有没有最小可复用 sample、函数、命令或代码片段？5. 如果这条路线不推荐，请明确原因，并给出更接近 NVIDIA 官方实践的替代路径。请返回：最相关资料/仓库、具体文件/函数、关键 API 顺序、最小代码路径、已知坑点、不适合照搬的地方。

P5.decision: Keep producer work as a latency-quality and scheduling trade-off story for the current stage. FIFO/consumer health is validated; bounded-delay improves matrix quality with explicit latency; stride5 reduces repeated LP solve cost; full real-time EIS remains unclaimed.
P5.next_route: Do not open a broad producer rewrite before presentation/evidence sync. A future producer loop should target first-row latency without changing accepted matrix quality semantics.

P6.decision_boundary: Tracked public project docs are synchronized. The Nutstore long-term context received only a minimal active-task status correction; no raw log or internal source text was copied.

P7.commit_scope: source/config/docs only; oral-template TXT, results, raw data, review videos, and secrets excluded

task_queue.title: Onboarding and control-plane health
task_queue.objective: Run onboard, doctor, Running claim check, loop profile listing, evaluation dataset checks, and git status before new work.
success_criteria: onboard passes with real oral-template proof
doctor passes
Running main-gate success claim remains forbidden
evaluation datasets pass
only expected dirty files are present

task_queue.title: State drift audit
task_queue.objective: Align Git HEAD, onboarding manifest, active loop contract, latest completed contract, README, and long-term context state.
success_criteria: current HEAD and active task state are recorded in tracked control-plane files
known long-term context drift is captured for later allowed maintenance
the oral template remains excluded from commit scope

task_queue.title: Register this long loop
task_queue.objective: Make this contract the active task-specific contract so P1-P7 do not drift into old completed contracts.
success_criteria: onboarding_manifest active_task_contract points here
orin_next_engineering_loop_v1 current_task points here
all edited JSON parses

task_queue.title: Startup black fix evidence inventory
task_queue.objective: Inventory the existing startup black-border follow-up evidence from vpi_cuda_owned_bridge_v1.
success_criteria: matrix path exists or missing state is classified
review video path exists or missing state is classified
black-border metrics are extracted from existing evidence

task_queue.title: Startup black fix objective closeout
task_queue.objective: Use existing metrics and review assets to decide whether the candidate is ready for human acceptance or must remain diagnostic.
success_criteria: left-edge first-frame and full-video black-border metrics are summarized
candidate remains pending human visual review unless the user explicitly accepts it
no EIS quality improvement is claimed from this FOV/startup fix

task_queue.title: Regular extension decision
task_queue.objective: If the candidate is accepted or objective evidence is sufficient for a bounded run, decide whether it should be extended to all five Regular clips.
success_criteria: extension route is either executed, prepared, or deferred with a reason
required success criteria are rc=0, fallback=0, mismatch=0, readable output, and black-border hard-gate health

task_queue.title: Stability and P99 contract design
task_queue.objective: Define a 30-minute or repeat-run stability/P99 evidence contract around accepted EGLImage, stream-only reuse, and NvBuffer pair paths.
success_criteria: metrics include p50/p95/p99, rc, fallback, frame mismatch, output readability, and temperature/activity if available
same-input and same-matrix semantics remain frozen
no system package or power-mode change is required without explicit need

task_queue.title: Stability evidence collection
task_queue.objective: Collect or prepare stability/P99 evidence on Jetson; use existing repeat evidence if hardware access blocks new runs.
success_criteria: each accepted candidate has a repeat/stability summary or a classified hardware blocker
stream-only reuse and NvBuffer pair are compared against accepted EGLImage only under frozen semantics
power/perf is labeled by its actual source and not overstated

task_queue.title: Backend decision table
task_queue.objective: Turn VPI/OpenCV/CUDA/MMAPI positive and negative evidence into an explicit backend decision table.
success_criteria: PerspectiveWarp, Remap, PyrLK, Dense OF, CUDA standalone, EGLImage, stream-only reuse, NvBuffer pair, and CUDA-owned bridge are separated
every row states evidence, value, risk, and whether it should be used

task_queue.title: Scale and dataflow evidence audit
task_queue.objective: Clarify which 640x360, 1080p, and 4K results are module-level, stage-level, or pipeline-level evidence.
success_criteria: module/stage/pipeline boundaries are explicit
no speedup is promoted outside its measured scope

task_queue.title: CUDA-MMAPI route recovery
task_queue.objective: Search local knowledge routing and public/official references for the correct CUDA/NvBufSurface/EGLImage/NVENC random-write route after the current bridge failure.
success_criteria: one concrete route, one risk, and one verifier are identified
if local/public sources are insufficient, a concise internal-AI prompt is produced in chat
the failed CUDA-owned bridge is not revived as accepted

task_queue.title: CUDA-MMAPI verifier preparation
task_queue.objective: Prepare or run a minimal identity-first verifier only if the recovered route is concrete enough.
success_criteria: identity must pass before translate
translate must pass before affine/matrix replay
tearing, green output, unreadable output, or cache/sync ambiguity stop the route

task_queue.title: Producer boundary audit
task_queue.objective: Summarize FIFO/consumer health, bounded-delay producer evidence, stride scheduling gains, and why full real-time EIS remains unclaimed.
success_criteria: consumer and producer bottlenecks are separated
delay-quality tradeoff is explicit
existing producer results are mapped to interview value

task_queue.title: Producer next-route decision
task_queue.objective: Decide whether a small producer follow-up is worth executing after P2-P4, or whether it should remain a boundary story.
success_criteria: decision separates technical feasibility from autumn-recruitment ROI
no full real-time claim is made without measured live same-input evidence

task_queue.title: Presentation and evidence sync

success_criteria: only measured or explicitly pending facts are written
claim boundaries remain conservative and useful
public docs do not copy internal source text

task_queue.title: Long-term context maintenance

Running main-gate claim remains forbidden

task_queue.title: Commit readiness
task_queue.objective: Prepare a clean commit scope when the stage is coherent.

task_queue.title: Checkpoint report
task_queue.objective: Report branch, remote, commit hash if committed, and working tree cleanliness. Push only if explicitly requested.
success_criteria: branch and remote are reported
commit hash is reported if a commit exists
dirty state is explained
no force push or unapproved remote write is attempted

order: read docs/knowledge_base/routing.md and matched source summaries after a real blocker
search official/public sources when local knowledge is insufficient
inspect external code only if it plausibly solves the exact blocker
if still blocked, stop the loop and report the blocker in chat with an internal-AI prompt
internal_ai_prompt_required_when: CUDA/NvBufSurface/EGLImage/NVENC ownership or sync cannot be resolved from local and public sources
a technical route fork would change the project direction
the next implementation would require a broad MMAPI rewrite

forbidden_routes: claiming full-pipeline acceleration from module-only or stage-only timing
committing the oral-template TXT, secrets, results, raw data, or review videos
stop_reasons: a required hardware or user visual decision is needed and cannot be completed locally
Jetson SSH or runtime access is unavailable for tasks that require new device evidence
local and public knowledge cannot resolve a technical route fork and an internal-AI prompt is required
editing an external long-term context file requires approval and cannot proceed
expected_outputs: updated onboarding manifest and active loop contract
startup-black-fix closeout notes in tracked project docs or contract fields
CUDA-MMAPI route recovery outcome or internal-AI prompt
